name: Nutrilite (the brand)
blurb: Amway's vitamin, mineral and dietary-supplement brand.
facts: The world's No. 1 selling brand of vitamins and dietary supplements (Euromonitor).
Grows many of its own plants on 6,000+ acres of certified-organic farmland in the US, Mexico and Brazil.
Uses natural methods on the farms — ladybugs instead of pesticides, compost instead of synthetic fertilizer.
Seed-to-supplement control means they trace ingredients from the farm to the finished product.
starter: Do you take a daily vitamin? Most people have no idea where the ingredients actually come from.

name: Artistry Skincare
blurb: Amway's premium skincare and color-cosmetics brand.
facts: Among the world's top-5 largest-selling premium skincare brands (Euromonitor).
Launched in 1968 and holds 250+ patents and patents pending.
Backed by a network of 900+ scientists across research and quality assurance.
Sold entirely person-to-person — not in any retail store.
starter: What's your skincare routine like right now — happy with it, or always tweaking?

name: eSpring Water Purifier
blurb: Under-counter water purifier with UV-C LED + carbon filter.
facts: First and only UV-C LED purifier certified by NSF to all four standards (42, 53, 55, 401).
Reduces 170+ contaminants including microplastics, PFOA/PFOS and pharmaceuticals.
Destroys up to 99.9999% of bacteria and 99.99% of viruses.
UV-C LEDs are built to last up to 10 years — no annual lamp to replace.
starter: Ever wonder what's actually in your tap water? The list surprised me.

name: XS Energy Drink
blurb: Sugar-free energy drink with B vitamins and lots of flavors.
facts: Sugar-free and only about 15 calories per can (0-1 g carbs).
A megadose of B vitamins and ~114 mg caffeine — like a 10 oz coffee.
Colors come from natural ingredients, not artificial dyes.
Certified kosher, with 20+ flavors including caffeine-free options.
starter: Do you drink energy drinks? Have you ever looked at the sugar in the popular ones?

name: Nutrilite Double X
blurb: The flagship multivitamin — vitamins, minerals and plant nutrients.
facts: 22 vitamins and minerals plus 22 plant concentrates in one supplement.
Includes the PhytoProtect blend (rosemary, turmeric, fava d'anta) for antioxidant support.
Supports heart, brain, bone, eye, immune and skin health with 40+ nutrients.
NSF certified — independently tested for what's on the label.
starter: If you could cover your whole day's nutrition gaps with one thing, would you want to see it?

name: Glister Multi-Action Toothpaste
blurb: Fluoride toothpaste with plant-based ingredients.
facts: Contains fluoride to help prevent cavities, consistent with FDA rules.
Uses a silica polishing agent and Nutrilite-certified peppermint.
Removes plaque and helps minimize buildup with regular brushing.
A little goes a long way — a small strip is enough.
starter: Random one — do you ever think about what's in your toothpaste?

name: Amway Home SA8 Laundry
blurb: Concentrated laundry detergent from the Legacy of Clean line.
facts: Concentrated triple-action formula — you use less per load.
Biodegradable with no phosphates or chlorine.
Recognized by the EPA Safer Choice program for safer ingredients.
Rinses clean in any water temperature and is safe for HE washers.
starter: How much do you spend on laundry stuff a month? Concentrated changes the math.

name: XS Sports Protein Powder
blurb: A whey-and-casein blend powder to help build lean muscle.
facts: About 23 g of whey and casein protein per serving.
Blends fast- and slow-digesting proteins for muscle support.
No artificial colors, flavors, or sweeteners.
Sold in chocolate and vanilla.
starter: Do you use a protein shake after workouts, or skip it?

name: Nutrilite Organics Plant Protein
blurb: Organic plant protein from brown rice, peas and chia.
facts: 21 g of organic plant protein per serving with all 9 essential amino acids.
No added sugar, and no artificial flavors, colors, preservatives or sweeteners.
Sourced in part from Nutrilite's own organic farms and partner farms.
Comes unflavored, chocolate and vanilla so it mixes into anything.
starter: What do you usually have for breakfast? A lot of folks are surprised how little protein they get.

name: G&H Body Care
blurb: Body wash, lotion and hand care with naturally derived ingredients.
facts: Built on naturally derived ingredients like orange-blossom honey and shea butter.
Uses Nutrilite white chia seed oil to support skin health.
Includes a patented anti-irritant complex — gentle for the whole family.
A full line: wash, scrub, lotion and hand care that work together.
starter: What body wash do you use? We switched to one that doesn't dry us out in winter.

name: Amway Home Dish Drops
blurb: Highly concentrated dishwashing liquid.
facts: Very concentrated — a small amount makes a lot of suds, so a bottle lasts.
Biodegradable surfactants and no phosphates.
Cuts grease in hot or cold water.
Part of the Legacy of Clean / Amway Home cleaning family.
starter: Do you go through dish soap fast? The concentrated kind honestly lasts us months.

name: XS Grass-Fed Whey Protein
blurb: A minimal-ingredient whey isolate from grass-fed cows.
facts: 30 g whey protein isolate from grass-fed cow's milk.
About 6.9 g BCAAs and 140 calories per serving.
Simple formula, no artificial additives.
Cows not treated with rBGH growth hormone.
starter: Does where your protein comes from, like grass-fed, matter to you?

name: Nutrilite Daily
blurb: Plant-based daily multivitamin with 22 essential vitamins and minerals.
facts: Provides 22 essential vitamins and minerals plus whole plant concentrates.
Plant concentrates include acerola cherry, spinach, parsley, carrot and alfalfa.
NSF certified; independently tested for purity, potency and label accuracy.
One tablet daily with a meal; sold in 60/180-tablet sizes.
starter: Do you take a daily multivitamin, or is that something you've meant to start?

name: Satinique Hair Care
blurb: Shampoo, conditioner and treatments for healthy-looking hair.
facts: A full system — shampoo, conditioner and targeted treatments made to work together.
Formulated to cleanse gently while adding shine and manageability.
Options for different hair needs like volume, smoothing and scalp care.
Part of Amway's beauty portfolio alongside Artistry.
starter: Are you a one-and-done shampoo person or do you have a whole routine?

name: Atmosphere Sky Air Purifier
blurb: Air treatment system with multi-stage HEPA filtration.
facts: Three-stage filtration: pre-filter, particulate/HEPA filter and odor/carbon filter.
Designed to capture very small airborne particles including many allergens.
Automatically senses air quality and adjusts fan speed.
Sized for a large room — good for bedrooms and living spaces.
starter: Anyone in your house deal with allergies? Indoor air is usually worse than people think.

name: XS Protein Pods
blurb: Single-serve protein sealed in a dissolvable film pod.
facts: 20 g whey protein isolate and 4.4 g BCAAs per pod.
Sealed in a tasteless, dissolvable food-grade film.
Just 90 calories with no sugar, fat, or gluten.
Drop one pod into water or milk.
starter: Have you ever seen protein that comes in a dissolvable pod?

name: Nutrilite Women's Daily Multivitamin
blurb: Women's multivitamin with 23 vitamins and minerals plus plant nutrients.
facts: 23 essential vitamins and minerals plus 200 mg of plant nutrients.
Tailored for women with iron, calcium and vitamin K.
Plant nutrients: cranberry, acerola cherry, purple carrot, elderberry, pomegranate.
NSF certified; vegetarian and free of gluten, dairy and lactose.
starter: Have you found a multivitamin that's actually made for a woman's needs?

name: Artistry Skin Nutrition
blurb: Artistry's core skincare regimen built around plant-based nutrition.
facts: Regimen steps: cleanse, tone, treat, moisturize.
Formulas infused with Nutrilite-grown botanicals.
Developed with University of Michigan scientists.
Offers Balancing and Hydrating system bundles.
starter: What does your current morning skincare routine look like?

name: Amway Home (Legacy of Clean)
blurb: Concentrated, plant-derived laundry, dish and surface cleaners.
facts: Made with ingredients from coconuts, citrus and minerals.
Biodegradable, phosphate-free and chlorine-free formulas.
Many products carry EPA Safer Choice recognition.
Formerly branded 'Legacy of Clean' in the US.
starter: What cleaning products do you keep under your kitchen sink right now?

name: XS Pre-Workout Boost
blurb: A pre-workout mix for energy, focus, and endurance.
facts: Clinical doses of L-citrulline and CarnoSyn beta-alanine.
Caffeine, rhodiola, and L-theanine for energy and focus.
No artificial sweeteners, colors, or preservatives.
Sold in Blue Raspberry and Green Apple.
starter: Do you take anything before a workout to get going?

name: Nutrilite Men's Daily Multivitamin
blurb: Men's multivitamin with 22 vitamins and minerals plus plant nutrients.
facts: 22 essential vitamins and minerals plus 200 mg of plant nutrients.
Includes higher levels of B vitamins for men's needs.
Plant nutrients: tomato, acerola cherry, purple carrot, elderberry, turmeric.
NSF certified; also offered as Organics daily multi gummies.
starter: What do you currently do to fill the gaps in your daily nutrition?

name: Artistry Signature Select
blurb: Customizable serum system with amplifiers you mix into a base.
facts: Amplifiers twist into a base serum for a custom blend.
Options include hydration, brightening, anti-wrinkle, firming.
Line also includes polishing, purifying and firming masks.
Personalized Serum won a 2018 AmeriStar design award.
starter: If you could target one skin concern, what would it be?

name: Amway Home L.O.C. Multi-Purpose Cleaner
blurb: Concentrated all-surface cleaner for washable items throughout the home.
facts: Cleans sealed tile, wood, vinyl, stone and ceramic.
Concentrated; diluted with water for most jobs.
Biodegradable, no phosphates or chlorine.
One of Amway's original 1959 products.
starter: Do you prefer one cleaner for everything, or a bottle per room?

name: XS Creatine+
blurb: Unflavored creatine with added HMB and electrolytes.
facts: 5 g creatine monohydrate per serving.
Adds 2 g calcium HMB plus three essential electrolytes.
Unflavored and unsweetened, mixes into any beverage.
Supports strength, power, and muscle recovery.
starter: Have you looked into creatine for your training yet?

name: Nutrilite Vitamin C Extended Release
blurb: 500 mg vitamin C released slowly for all-day immune support.
facts: Delivers 500 mg vitamin C released steadily over about 8 hours.
Made with acerola cherry grown on Nutrilite farms plus citrus bioflavonoids.
One tablet daily; NSF certified and suitable for vegetarians.
Not intended for pregnant/breastfeeding women or children under 12.
starter: When you take vitamin C, is it the slow-release kind or one-and-done?

name: Artistry Supreme LX
blurb: Artistry's luxury skincare collection with premium botanicals.
facts: Includes Regenerating Cream and Regenerating Eye Cream.
Features Gardenia Grandiflora stem cell extracts.
Uses 24-karat gold optical light-diffusion technology.
Launched in the US in 2016 as the luxury tier.
starter: Have you ever tried a premium, splurge-level skincare product?

name: Amway Home Glass Cleaner
blurb: Ammonia-free concentrated glass cleaner for streak-free windows.
facts: Ammonia-free; leaves surfaces smudge- and streak-free.
Recognized by EPA's Safer Choice program.
1 L concentrate refills a 500 mL spray bottle 8 times.
Avoid on unsealed wood, marble or stone.
starter: What do you use to keep windows and mirrors streak-free?

name: XS Muscle Multiplier
blurb: An essential amino acid supplement for muscle support.
facts: 4.1 g of all nine essential amino acids per serving.
Optimized 5:1:1 BCAA ratio plus L-arginine.
Zero sugar; no dairy, gluten, or soy.
Supports muscle growth and post-workout recovery.
starter: Do you sip anything with amino acids during long training days?

name: Nutrilite Vitamin D
blurb: Once-daily vitamin D to help support bone and immune health.
facts: Once-daily tablet providing vitamin D to help support bone health.
Made with cultured yeast, a concentrated natural source of vitamin D.
Helps the body absorb and use calcium for strong bones.
NSF certified; take one tablet daily with or without food.
starter: Have you ever had your vitamin D checked? A lot of people run low.

name: Artistry Studio
blurb: Trend-driven makeup and bath collections inspired by cities.
facts: Editions themed on cities like NYC, Paris and Tokyo.
Includes makeup plus specialty bath and body items.
Skincare uses clean Zen and Energy ingredients.
Aimed at a younger, on-the-go audience.
starter: Which city's vibe would you want your makeup to match?

name: Amway Home Bathroom Cleaner
blurb: Concentrated bathroom cleaner that tackles soap scum and hard water.
facts: Uses naturally derived ingredients including citric acid.
Removes hard-water spots, film and shower mildew.
Recognized by EPA's Safer Choice program.
1 L concentrate refills a 500 mL spray bottle 8 times.
starter: What's the toughest spot to clean in your bathroom?

name: XS CocoWater Hydration Drink Mix
blurb: A coconut-water-based drink mix for everyday hydration.
facts: Contains 12% coconut water concentrate.
Helps replace key electrolytes lost during activity.
Powder stirred into water.
Comes in fruit blends like Strawberry-Watermelon.
starter: How do you like to stay hydrated when it gets hot out?

name: Nutrilite Advanced Omega
blurb: Fish-oil omega-3 supporting heart, brain and cellular health.
facts: Over 1,000 mg of EPA, DHA and ALA per serving.
Fish oil is Friend of the Sea certified, wild-caught; ALA from chia seeds.
Formulated for enhanced absorption of omega-3s.
Two softgels per serving with reduced fishy aftertaste.
starter: Do you eat enough fatty fish for omega-3s, or do you supplement?

name: Artistry Men
blurb: Men's skincare regimen built for oil control and hydration.
facts: Includes face wash, post-shave toner, moisturizer and serum.
Built around an exclusive dual-phase DermaSync complex.
Launched in the US in 2015 as a multi-step system.
Targets facial oil and moisture balance.
starter: Does the guy in your life have any kind of skincare routine?

name: Pursue Disinfectants
blurb: EPA-registered disinfectant cleaners for household surfaces.
facts: EPA-registered to kill common household germs, bacteria and viruses.
Comes as a concentrate you dilute and a ready-to-use spray.
The spray also deodorizes rooms as it disinfects.
Follow the label's wet-contact time for full effect.
starter: Do you keep a disinfectant handy for kitchen and bathroom surfaces?

name: XS Sports Twist Tubes
blurb: A liquid electrolyte concentrate you squeeze into water.
facts: Liquid concentrate squeezed into 500 mL of water.
Electrolytes plus B vitamins and selenium.
Just 5 g of sugar per serving.
Comes in fruit flavors like Raspberry Lemonade.
starter: Ever tried a squeeze-in electrolyte drink for your water bottle?

name: Nutrilite Cal Mag D
blurb: Balanced calcium, magnesium and vitamin D for bone health.
facts: Combines calcium, magnesium and vitamin D in one supplement.
Calcium comes from calcified seaweed and calcium carbonate.
Vitamin D helps enhance the body's calcium absorption.
NSF certified; available in 180 and 360 tablet sizes.
starter: Are you getting enough calcium and magnesium, or is that one you skip?

name: Artistry Makeup
blurb: Artistry color cosmetics spanning face, eyes, and lips.
facts: Future Glow Serum Foundation blends skincare and SPF 35 coverage.
Exact Fit foundations use a shade-matched system.
Go Vibrant line covers lipstick, mascara and eyeshadow.
Formulas are Artistry Clean and not tested on animals.
starter: What's the one makeup product you never leave home without?

name: Amway Home SA8 Prewash Spray
blurb: Pretreatment spray that lifts tough stains before laundering.
facts: Blend of solvents and surfactants removes greasy stains.
No scrubbing or soaking required.
Safe for color-fast fabrics; light citrus scent.
Contains no ozone-damaging CFCs.
starter: How do you handle a stain before it goes in the wash?

name: BodyKey Meal Replacement Shake Mix
blurb: A low-calorie shake mix that stands in for a meal.
facts: 16 g protein and 110 calories per serving.
Gluten-free, with fiber and 22 vitamins and minerals.
Made to replace one or two meals daily.
No artificial colors, flavors, or preservatives.
starter: Have you tried using a shake in place of a meal?

name: Nutrilite Kids Daily Chewable Multivitamins
blurb: Chewable multivitamin for kids with plant ingredients, no artificial extras.
facts: Designed for children ages 4-12 with 13 vitamins and 5 minerals.
Plant ingredients represent 5 phytonutrient color groups.
No artificial colors, flavors, sweeteners or preservatives.
Two chewable tablets daily with a meal, under parent supervision.
starter: Do your kids take a vitamin, or is the veggie battle the daily struggle?

name: Glister Oral Care System
blurb: Glister's mouthwash and rinse system beyond the toothpaste.
facts: Multi-Action Concentrated Oral Rinse is alcohol-free.
One travel concentrate bottle provides up to 100 uses.
Uses Nutrilite-certified peppermint for fresh breath.
Part of a brush, rinse, refresh daily routine.
starter: Do you use a mouthwash as part of your daily routine?

name: Amway Home Scrub Buds Scouring Pads
blurb: Reusable stainless steel scouring pads that won't rust.
facts: Made from high-grade stainless steel; sold in a 4-pack.
Dishwasher safe and reusable.
Not for nonstick coatings or mirror finishes.
Good on pots, casserole dishes and stainless cookware.
starter: Do you use disposable sponges or something reusable for pots?

name: BodyKey Meal Bars
blurb: Portion-controlled bars to help manage hunger and calories.
facts: Portion-controlled bars formulated to help satisfy hunger.
Help control portion size and calorie intake.
No artificial colors, flavors, or preservatives.
Comes in flavors like Chocolate Brownie and Cookies & Cream.
starter: When you're busy, do you reach for a bar instead of a meal?

name: Nutrilite Balance Within Probiotic
blurb: Once-daily probiotic with five strains and prebiotic fiber.
facts: Blend of 6.3 billion CFU from 5 clinically tested probiotic strains.
Includes 1 g of prebiotic inulin fiber from chicory root.
Uses Arrive Alive and Stick to the Gut technologies.
A Stress Relief Probiotic option offers 18 billion CFU.
starter: Have you ever tried a probiotic to help with digestion and gut health?

name: Artistry Fragrance
blurb: Artistry eau de parfum fragrances crafted at European houses.
facts: Flora Chic Eau de Parfum was created by Givaudan in Paris.
Notes of French Clementine, Bulgarian Rose and Ylang Ylang.
Both women's and men's fragrance options exist.
Sold in the Beauty Fragrances section on amway.com.
starter: Do you have a signature scent you always come back to?

name: iCook Cookware
blurb: Multi-ply stainless steel cookware built for even, efficient cooking.
facts: Multi-ply 18/10 (type 304) stainless steel construction.
Vitalok method retains heat and nutrients while cooking.
Lifetime warranty on stainless pieces and lids.
Oven-safe up to 400 degrees F; hand washing recommended.
starter: How's your current cookware holding up for everyday cooking?

name: Nutrilite Sleep Health
blurb: Melatonin-free sleep supplement with valerian, hops and lemon balm.
facts: Melatonin-free blend of valerian, hops and lemon balm.
Plant ingredients sourced from Nutrilite and partner farms.
Formulated to promote relaxation and support restful sleep.
Take three tablets before bedtime; NSF certified.
starter: When you can't wind down at night, do you reach for anything to relax?

name: Nutrilite Memory Builder
blurb: Cistanche and ginkgo blend to help support memory and recall.
facts: Proprietary blend of cistanche tubulosa and ginkgo biloba.
Helps support short- and long-term memory.
Uses a standardized extract of ginkgo biloba.
Take two tablets daily, preferably with meals.
starter: Do you ever notice your focus or recall slipping when you're tired?

name: Nutrilite Immunity Echinacea
blurb: Plant-powered immune support from farm-grown echinacea.
facts: Made with echinacea grown on Amway's own farms.
Uses a proprietary triple blend of echinacea extracts.
Sold in an Immunity Pack paired with Vitamin C Extended Release.
Related Immunity Defense adds zinc, selenium and copper.
starter: When cold season hits, do you do anything to support your immune system?

name: Nutrilite Concentrated Fruits and Vegetables
blurb: Phytonutrients equal to five-plus servings of produce per tablet.
facts: Delivers the phytonutrient equivalent of 5+ servings of fruits and vegetables.
Contains 13 plant extracts including quercetin, EGCG and hesperidin.
Includes lutein and lycopene phytonutrients.
One tablet daily; NSF certified, gluten free, no artificial additives.
starter: Honestly, how many servings of fruits and veggies do you get in a day?

name: Nutrilite Joint Health
blurb: Glucosamine and chondroitin blend supporting joints and cartilage.
facts: Blend of six ingredients including glucosamine and chondroitin.
Helps support joint cartilage and connective tissue.
Also available as a Twist Tubes 2GO drink mix.
Contains shellfish-derived ingredients; NSF certified.
starter: Do your knees or joints ever remind you of it after a long day?

name: Nutrilite Vitamin B Dual-Action
blurb: Bi-layer B-vitamin tablet for caffeine-free all-day energy support.
facts: Bi-layer tablet releases 2 B vitamins fast and 6 over 8 hours.
Delivers all 8 essential B vitamins with no caffeine.
Made with spirulina from a certified partner aqua-farm.
One tablet daily; do not chew or cut it. NSF certified.
starter: Do you hit an afternoon slump, and how do you push through it?

name: Nutrilite Heart Health CoQ10
blurb: CoQ10 softgel supporting cellular energy and heart health.
facts: One softgel provides 30 mg of CoQ10 for cellular energy.
Adds phytonutrients from rosemary and citrus grown on Amway farms.
The body produces less CoQ10 with age; this helps maintain levels.
Also offered as a CoQ10 Plus variant with taurine and L-carnitine.
starter: Have you heard of CoQ10? It's a big one for heart and energy support.

name: n by Nutrilite Sweet Dreams Sleep Gummies
blurb: Melatonin sleep gummies with magnesium and passionflower.
facts: Each serving has 3 mg melatonin, 50 mg magnesium and passionflower.
Blueberry-lavender gummies to help promote restful sleep.
A melatonin option, distinct from melatonin-free Sleep Health.
An easy gummy alternative to swallowing tablets.
starter: Do you prefer a gummy over a tablet when it comes to supplements?
